zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England於1437年2月3日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾葛拉芙頓 雷吉時，她的父親Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers31歲，母親Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers21歲。她於1452年與Sir John Grey在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1492年6月8日在英國素瑞貝爾蒙享年55歲，埋葬在英國波克夏溫莎女爵 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England于1437年2月3日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾葛拉芙頓 雷吉时，她的父亲Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers31岁，母亲Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers21岁。她于1452年与Sir John Grey在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1492年6月8日在英国素瑞貝爾蒙享年55岁，埋葬在英国波克夏溫莎女爵 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England was born on 3 February 1437, in Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers, was 31 and her mother, Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers, was 21. She married Sir John Grey in 1452, in Groby, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 8 June 1492, in Bermondsey, Surrey, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England est née le 3 février 1437, à Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Grey en 1452, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 8 juin 1492, à Bermondsey, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England am 3. Februar 1437 in Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers 31 und ihre Mutter Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers 21. Sie hat 1452 in Groby, Leicestershire, England Sir John Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 8. Juni 1492 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Bermondsey, Surrey, England und wurde in Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England è nata il il 3 febbraio 1437 nel Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Grey nel 1452, nel Groby, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 8 giugno 1492, nel Bermondsey, Surrey, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of Englandが1437年2月3日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグラフトン レジスで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Riversは31歳，母Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Riversは21歳であった。1452年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーでSir John Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1492年6月8日にイギリススリーバーモンドセイで55歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソル カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England(이)가 1437년 2월 3일 영국 노르섬프토실르 그라프턴 레지스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1452년 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 Sir John Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1492년 6월 8일 영국 수리 버몽시에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 윈드소르 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England nasceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1437, em Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Grey em 1452, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 8 de junho de 1492, em Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England родилась 3 февраля 1437 г. в местности графтон регис, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Grey в 1452 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 8 июня 1492 г. в местности бирмондси, сурри, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности виндзор кастл, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England nació el 3 de febrero de 1437, en Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir John Grey en 1452, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 8 de junio de 1492, en Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
